hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.json ]] && { jq empty "$f" 2>/dev/null || printf '{"systemMessage":"Invalid JSON in %s — fix before committing."}' "$(basename "$f")"; }; }

v1=$(jq -r '.plugins[0].version' /Users/senthilpalanivelu/Programme/craft-marketplace/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json 2>/dev/null); v2=$(jq -r '.version' /Users/senthilpalanivelu/Programme/craft-marketplace/plugins/craft-framework/.claude-plugin/plugin.json 2>/dev/null); [[ -n "$v1" && -n "$v2" && "$v1" != "$v2" ]] && printf '{"systemMessage":"\u26a0 Version mismatch: marketplace.json=%s, plugin.json=%s \u2014 update both to match."}' "$v1" "$v2" || true
